particulars.description: The freehold property known as or being hale and horringford farms, hale common, arreton, isle of wight with registered title number IW65283.

F/H property k/a land and buildings at arreton manor farm arreton t/no. IW364403 together with all buildings & fixtures (including trade fixtures). Fixed plant & machinery by way of fixed charge, all present & future book & other debts, floating charge over all moveable plant machinery, implements, utensils, furniture & equipment by way of assignment. The goodwill of the business (if any), the full benefit of all licences & guarantees.
